'''Haverling''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Albarrio sector/Legends|Albarrio sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], near the world of [[Morishim]]. It joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], aiding the government by providing new [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] to support the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]].

{{Planet-stub}}
